notes: Absorption is derived algebraically rather than from raw truth assignments: phi and (phi or psi) == phi follows from distribution (thm:distributive-laws) plus idempotence/identity in thm:basic-boolean-equivalence-laws, with == as def:logical-equivalence. A consistent layering choice -- derived laws build on the foundational laws (0004/0008) instead of re-deriving from semantics.
